titleStmt.title: SII 37.327: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 327. (A.R. No. B 434 of 1940-41.) Kibilē-Sugumañchipalle, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in front of the Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1470, Kīlaka, Māgha, śu. 7, corresponding to 1549 A.D. January 6, Sunday.

It records the conversion of the Karaṇika-manyās, Vṛitti-manyās and the wet lands given formerly to the Karaṇams of the village by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chinna Timmayadēva Mahārāju of Āravīḍu, into sarvamānya lands free from all taxes. The village Sukumañchipalle which is called a Paḍumaṭihōra-grāma is stated to be included in the Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma, held by the donor as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1470 [Agunēṭi] kīlaka saṁvatsara māgha śu
dha 7 lu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrī sadāśivadēva mahārāyalugāru vidyānagaramaṁdu va
jra siṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgā
nu śrīmaṁmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Ātrēyagōtra pavitṛlaina sōmavaṁ
śādhīśvarulaina śrī kṛṣṇa pādāraviṁda dvitīyya śāvakulaina nissima
bhūdāna cakrava¨rttulaina parama dhā¨rmmikulaina padavākya pramāṇa
gulaina Āravīṭi bukkarājugāri prapautṛluṁ tiṁmarājugāri putṛlu cinatiṁmayyadēvama
hārājuluṁgāru sukumaṁcipalle grāmakaraṇālaku yi
ccina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . śrī sadāsivadēva mahārāyalugā
ru māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina ghaṁḍikōṭasīmalōni
paḍumaṭi hōra grāmaṁ sukumaṁci pallenu miṁmmu plavaṁga
saṁvatsarānanu mīkariṇika mānyālakuṁnu vritimānyāla
kuṁnu varimaḷḷaknu koṁnnamāḷlu yī rathasaptamī puṁṇya
kālamaṁdu dhāravōsi sa¨rvamānyaṁśēsi yistimi ganaka mī
ṁgāna mīputra pautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rka
sthāIgānu Anubhaviṁci bratikēdi . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
vāyōharēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhi¨rva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatēkrimi . ĒkāĪka bhaginīlōkē savōṁṣāṁ yēva
bhūbhujanabhōjyānakara grāṁhya vipradattā vasu
ṁdharā . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 37.327 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
